source_metadata.title: 2025 07 31 Petitions
source_metadata.description:
Thursday 31 July 2025 | Petitions Committee

Petition of Christina Gillmore: Establish nationwide regulations and standards for laser tattoo removal; Petition of Christian van der Pump: Fire and Emergency New Zealand to release incident data statistics

Submitters:

Petition of Christina Gillmore: Establish nationwide regulations and standards for laser tattoo removal

Christina Gillmore

Ministry of Health
- Jane Chamber, Group Manager Public Health Policy & Legislation
- Clare Possenniskie, Manager, Ope Takaiapu Public Health Agency
- Kevin Lampen-Smith, Chief Regulatory Officer

Petition of Christian van der Pump: Fire and Emergency New Zealand to release incident data statistics

Christian van der Pump

Fire & Emergency New Zealand
- Hamish McEwen, Chief Data & Analytics Office
